case_title: KIMLANG CORPORATION VS. TAMSON COMPANY LLC DBA GRAND PALACE et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KIMLANG CORPORATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TAMSON COMPANY LLC DBA GRAND PALACE $23,931.00 PRINCIPAL, $1,196.50 INTEREST, $410.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $25,537.50, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR SEP-15-2009 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 212
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF KIMLANG CORPORATION SERVED JUN-03-2009, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT TAMSON COMPANY LLC DBA GRAND PALACE
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE PROOF OF SERVICE ON SEP-15-2009 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF KIMLANG CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT TAMSON COMPANY LLC DBA GRAND PALACE DOES1-5 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR OCT-23-2009 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUL-27-2009 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         OCT-08-2009
REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED, SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF KIMLANG CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT TAMSON COMPANY LLC DBA GRAND PALACE
SUMMONS ISSUED (AMENDED) TO PLAINTIFF KIMLANG CORPORATION
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES1-5

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $410.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT TAMSON COMPANY LLC DBA GRAND PALACE
DECLARATION IN LIEU OF TESTIMONY FILED BY PLAINTIFF KIMLANG CORPORATION
